approvalNotes: Approved unattended Foundation continuation after FOUNDATION-004.
Build the Freedom Sheet source adapter/schema-drift monitor as a safe read-only card.
Do not mutate spreadsheets, Drive permissions, ClickUp, FUB, finance, credentials, OAuth scopes, provider config, or external systems.
Close only with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship.
